page.emptyUpcoming: You have no upcoming sessions — find an expert to get started.

card.onlineReminder: Your expert will share a meeting link (Zoom / Teams) before the session.
card.rescheduledMessage: Your session is now booked for <1>{{datetime}}</1>. Confirmation emails have been sent to you and your expert.
card.lockoutMessage: Cancellations and reschedules are not accepted within 12 hours of your session. Please contact support if you need assistance.
card.rescheduleTitle: Select a new date and time
card.noSlotsOnDate: No available slots on this date — try another day.
card.reasonRequired: Please provide a reason for your cancellation.
card.cancelError: Could not cancel. Please try again.
card.rescheduleError: Could not reschedule. Please try again.
card.refundHalf: You'll receive a 50% refund{{amount}} — cancellation is between 12 and 24 hours before your session.
card.withdrawalLeadIn: Your new Session may take place within the next 14 days, so we need your go-ahead:
card.withdrawalLabel: I expressly request that my Session take place before the end of the 14-day cooling-off (withdrawal) period, and I understand that my right of withdrawal ends once the Session has been fully delivered.
card.withdrawalWhyBody: EU law gives you 14 days to change your mind about online purchases. Because your Session may happen within those 14 days, we ask you to confirm you'd like to go ahead — your options under our Cancellation and Rescheduling Policy are not affected.
card.withdrawalRequiredError: Please confirm the early-performance consent to reschedule into the next 14 days.

pastCard.expertCancelledRefund: A full refund of {{amount}} has been issued. Please allow 5–10 business days to appear in your account.
pastCard.expertCancelledSimple: A full refund has been issued.
pastCard.refundFailedTitle: Your bank couldn't process the refund.
pastCard.refundFailedMsg: This is usually a temporary issue on your bank's end. Please contact your bank directly to resolve it.
pastCard.partialRefundMsg: {{amount}} refunded to your original payment method.
pastCard.expertDeleted: This expert is no longer on the platform.
pastCard.serviceInactive: This service is no longer offered by the expert.
pastCard.unavailableSuffix: You can browse other available experts.

cancellationPolicy.compactBody: >24 h before → full refund · 12–24 h before → 50% refund · <12 h or no-show → no refund
cancellationPolicy.intro: We understand that life happens and plans sometimes change. To honour the commitment made by both you and your expert — who has dedicated this time exclusively for you — the following cancellation policy applies to all bookings:
cancellationPolicy.tier3Suffix: before your session or no-show → No refund
cancellationPolicy.rescheduleNote: Need to change your time? You can reschedule for free as long as you do so more than 12 hours before your session — simply use the Reschedule option in your booking.
cancellationPolicy.expertCancelNote: If your expert cancels for any reason, you will always receive a <1>full refund</1> regardless of timing.
cancellationPolicy.footer: Cancellations are processed based on the time your request is received by Sage Nest. If you have any questions, our support team is here to help.

consentBlock.termsLabel: I have read and accept the <0>Consumer Terms</0> and the <1>Cancellation and Rescheduling Policy</1>.
consentBlock.withdrawalLeadIn: Your Session may take place within the next 14 days, so we need your go-ahead:
consentBlock.withdrawalLabel: I expressly request that my Session take place before the end of the 14-day cooling-off (withdrawal) period, and I understand that my right of withdrawal ends once the Session has been fully delivered.
consentBlock.withdrawalWhyBody: EU law gives you 14 days to change your mind about online purchases. Because your Session may happen within those 14 days, we ask you to confirm you'd like to go ahead — your options under our Cancellation and Rescheduling Policy are not affected.
consentBlock.privacyNotice: Your personal data is processed to manage your booking, as described in our <0>Privacy Policy</0>.

confirmStep.title: Confirm your booking
confirmStep.subtitle: Review your details below before proceeding to payment.

slotStep.title: Choose a time
slotStep.noSlots: No available slots on this date.
slotStep.timezone: Times shown in your local timezone.
slotStep.lockExpired: Your slot reservation expired. Please select a time again.
slotStep.lockConflict: This slot was just reserved by another parent. Please select a different time.
slotStep.lockError: Could not reserve this slot. Please try again.
slotStep.bookError: Could not create booking. Please try again.
slotStep.slotUnavailable: This slot is no longer available. Please select a different time.

summary.title: Booking summary
summary.reserved: Slot reserved for you — expires in {{time}}
summary.currencyNotice: Prices are set by the expert in their local currency ({{currency}}). Your bank may apply a conversion fee if this differs from your card currency.
summary.healthDisclaimer: Sage Nest is a booking platform, not a healthcare provider. Practitioners listed on this platform are independent professionals. Advice given during sessions does not constitute medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment and should not be relied upon as a substitute for professional medical care. Always seek the advice of a qualified healthcare provider if you have concerns about your or your child's health. If you believe you or your child need urgent medical care, contact emergency services immediately.
summary.noChargeYet: You won't be charged until payment is confirmed on the next step.

checkout.currencyNotice: Prices are set by the expert in their local currency ({{currency}}). Your bank may apply a conversion fee if this differs from your card currency.
checkout.stripeNote: Secured by Stripe. Your card details are never stored by Sage Nest.
checkout.paymentExpiredBody: Your slot reservation has been released. Please go back and select a new time.

success.title: Booking confirmed
success.emailNotice: Confirmation email sent. Your expert will share a meeting link at least 24 hours before your session.

failed.bodyRefunded: Your booking has been refunded. Funds will appear in 5–10 business days.
failed.bodyFailed: Your payment did not go through. Please try again.

pending.title: Confirming your booking…
pending.body: We're waiting for payment confirmation. This usually takes a few seconds.
pending.takingLonger: This is taking longer than usual.

imLate.notePlaceholder: E.g. stuck in traffic, will be there shortly…
imLate.confirmBody: {{name}} will receive an email (and SMS if available) that you're running ~{{minutes}} minutes late.
imLate.sentConfirm: {{name}} has been notified you're on your way.
imLate.sendError: Could not send notification. Please try again.

consentLabels.termsPrefix: I have read and agree to the
consentLabels.marketingOptIn: I'd like to receive tips, expert advice, and updates from Sage Nest by email. You can unsubscribe at any time.
consentLabels.marketingOptInShort: I'd like occasional parenting tips from Sage Nest (optional)
consentLabels.termsRequired: You must accept the Terms & Conditions to continue.
